Modifications.Value:
Drenches enemy units in alcohol, reducing movement speed and causing attacks to have a chance to miss.
|n|cffffcc00Lasts <ANdh,Dur1> seconds (5 for Heroes).|r

|cffffcc00Level 1|r – <ANdh,DataC1,%> movement speed reduction, <ANdh,DataB1,%> miss chance.
|n|cffffcc00Level 2|r – <ANdh,DataC2,%> movement speed reduction, <ANdh,DataB2,%> miss chance.
|n|cffffcc00Level 3|r – <ANdh,DataC3,%> movement speed reduction, <ANdh,DataB3,%> miss chance.
|n|cffffcc00Level 4|r – <ANdh,DataC4,%> movement speed reduction, <ANdh,DataB4,%> miss chance.
